task_description: Implement a user authentication system (register/login with email, username, password) and redesign the games lobby to show the authenticated user's games, whose turn it is, and allow them to join/resume their games. Integrate auth with WebSocket connections so the server knows which user is playing. Add player identity badge in the GameBoard header.

verification.summary: All three features implemented successfully. npm run build passes with zero TypeScript errors. Auth system (register/login/JWT), WebSocket auth integration, game-user associations, and redesigned lobby UI all compile cleanly. Post-review fixes applied for issues #4, #5, #6, #7.
